meta.our_scoring_note: AEVUM is pre-launch (target soft-launch Q3 2026, RTS-Link-aligned full launch Q4 2026). 3 Siemens magnets + named consultant radiologists are confirmed; MSQH accreditation in pursuit, target Q4 2027. Insurer-network onboarding (AIA / Prudential MY) is a Y3 attack plan, not Y1. Scores reflect launch-state capability, not aspiration.

strategy_canvas.headline_thesis: AEVUM breaks the cluster on cross_border_proximity (no competitor is within walking distance of the RTS Link) and published_pricing_transparency (every SG and JB competitor gates pricing behind 'enquire'), at the deliberate cost of follow_up_specialist_breadth (Mt Elizabeth, Raffles, Gleneagles JB will continue to win patients who need same-roof endoscopy + cardiac specialist follow-up). The MRI-led longevity wedge is open in JB.

rubrics.cross_border_proximity: 0 — Outside SEA. 1 — SG-only or KL-only, no cross-border story. 2 — JB / Iskandar facility but >30 min from Causeway / RTS terminus. 3 — JB facility within 30 min drive of Causeway. 4 — JB facility within 15 min drive of Causeway / Bukit Chagar. 5 — Walking distance from RTS Link Bukit Chagar terminus AND cross-border concierge transfer included.
rubrics.published_pricing_transparency: 0 — 'Contact for quote'; no figures published. 1 — Tier names visible but prices behind a form. 2 — Partial price disclosure (entry tier only, top tier hidden). 3 — Top-tier prices published in foreign currency only. 4 — Full tier ladder published in local currency. 5 — Full tier ladder published in BOTH MYR and SGD-equivalent at current FX, with MAB-compliant package framing.
rubrics.concierge_experience_depth: 0 — Pure hospital-utility ambience. 1 — Standalone clinic but waiting-room feel. 2 — Premium clinic with private suite, no transfer / lounge. 3 — Private suite + named host + post-scan radiologist time. 4 — Full concierge wrapper: transfer + lounge + dining + post-scan radiologist + family-friendly suite. 5 — Multi-day hospitality bundle with hotel-partner integration + family-language briefing.
rubrics.named_consultant_radiologist: 0 — Anonymous radiologist roster (no named credentials). 1 — Roster mentioned but no individual bios. 2 — Bios shown but no professional credential / NSR linkage. 3 — Bios + credentials displayed; report signed by named consultant. 4 — Named consultant with searchable NSR / SMC linkage AND post-scan video walkthrough included. 5 — As 4 + multi-year named-consultant relationship (same radiologist for return scans) + named consultant accessible for 12-month follow-up.
rubrics.results_turnaround_speed: 0 — >14 days. 1 — 7-14 days. 2 — 5-7 days. 3 — 3-5 days. 4 — Next-day digital report. 5 — Same-day digital report + scheduled follow-up consultation within 5 days.
rubrics.mri_led_longevity_framing: 0 — No longevity framing; pure diagnostic / hospital language. 1 — Generic 'health screening' framing. 2 — 'Wellness screening' framing without longevity vocabulary. 3 — Longevity framing present but secondary to other modalities (e.g. biomarkers-led with MRI as add-on). 4 — Explicit MRI-led longevity-baseline framing throughout marketing + product. 5 — As 4 + multi-year baseline-tracking product (year-on-year scan comparison) + longevity-coach integration.
rubrics.follow_up_specialist_breadth: 0 — Imaging only, no follow-up pathway. 1 — Refer to patient’s home GP. 2 — Partner GP network for follow-up. 3 — In-house GP/internist + 1-2 specialty referrals. 4 — Hospital-grade specialist depth (cardiac, endoscopy, oncology) under one roof. 5 — Full hospital-anchored follow-up with insurer-direct billing.
rubrics.sg_insurer_network_linkage: 0 — Outside SG insurer network entirely; pure self-pay. 1 — Discussions ongoing with one major insurer. 2 — Single insurer network status secured but no claim flow live. 3 — One insurer claim flow live for one SKU. 4 — Two-three major insurers (AIA, Prudential, GE) network status with live claim flow. 5 — All major SG IS Plan insurers (AIA, Prudential, GE, Income, Singlife) network status across all relevant SKUs.

segments.name: SG HNW longevity-curious
segments.descriptor: 42-60yo SG resident, household income S$500k+, lives D9/D10/Sentosa Cove; aware of Prenuvo + Neko but unbooked; refuses to fly to US for a scan; primary segment 60-70% of revenue forecast.

segments.name: Indonesian HNW family office
segments.descriptor: 35-65yo, family business / banking / commodities with SG family-office structure; routes through SG private bankers; pairs medical with retail / hospitality on a 4-day SG/JB long weekend; highest-ARPU secondary segment (15-25% revenue).

segments.name: Malaysian Affluent professional
segments.descriptor: 35-55yo professional / SME owner / corp exec in JB / KL / Penang; RM 50k+/mo household; loyal to Gleneagles / Sunway; books via WhatsApp; high-volume Core/Comp segment (10-15% revenue).

segments.name: C-Suite executive program buyer
segments.descriptor: Corporate HR / family-office / PE-portfolio operator buying for C-suite cohort or principal family; RFP-driven, 6-12 month sales cycle; B2B Founders Programme channel (20-30% revenue once mature).

segments.name: SG patient chronic follow-up
segments.descriptor: Diabetes / cardiac / cancer-survivor SG patient who needs annual surveillance imaging; insurer-coverage-sensitive; cares about specialist follow-up depth more than concierge.

segments.name: Regional health tourist (BN/TH/VN)
segments.descriptor: Brunei / Thai / Vietnamese affluent who would otherwise fly to BKK or SG; can route through KL/JB via Senai or Changi; small but growing slice (~5% revenue).

attack_plans.niche_name: RTS Link concierge MRI for SG HNW longevity-curious
attack_plans.icp: 42-60yo SG resident with household income S$500k+, lives D9/D10/Sentosa Cove, longevity-aware (Huberman/Attia listener), unbooked despite knowing about Prenuvo/Neko, refuses to fly for an MRI, comfortable with SG↔JB cross-border via the new RTS Link.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: Of the ~32,000 SG addressable buyers in the SAM (Manulife Affluent 2024 + Singstat HIES 2024), ~50% are in the 42-60yo longevity-curious cohort = ~16,000. Forecast Y3 capture at ~10% = ~1,600 buyers/yr × ~S$2,640 (Comprehensive blended ARPU) + ~10% upgrade to Legacy Ultimate = ~S$25M slice TAM. Pre-RTS Link Y1 hits ~200 of these; Y2 ramps to ~700 once RTS opens; Y3 to ~1,600 at maturity.
attack_plans.why_gap: No competitor occupies 'walking distance from RTS Link Bukit Chagar terminus' — that geography simply did not exist as a category before the RTS opens end-2026. Every SG hospital (Mt E, Raffles, NUH, SGH) is on the wrong side of the Causeway. Every JB hospital (KPJ BDO, Gleneagles JB) is hospital-utility framing, not concierge longevity. Every international DTC (Prenuvo, Neko, Ezra) has no SEA presence. The gap is structural and time-bound: it closes the moment a competitor opens a second walking-distance facility, but the 18-24 month build window plus PHFSA Class C licensing creates an effective head-start window through end-2027.
attack_plans.why_we_win: our_score 5 on cross_border_proximity (the only walking-distance to Bukit Chagar) + our_score 5 on published_pricing_transparency + our_score 4 on named_consultant_radiologist + our_score 5 on same_day_results = the four dimensions SG HNW longevity-curious explicitly value. Combined with Elitez Group operational backing (37yr, 4 cities, 350 staff — not a startup), 3 Siemens magnets (1.5T + 3T), and S$2,640 Comprehensive lands ~78% below Mt E ceiling. The deliberate concession on follow_up_specialist_breadth (our_score 2) is mitigated by a Gleneagles JB referral protocol for any abnormal findings.

gtm.channel: Curated 200-name SG HNW pre-launch list seeded via DBS Treasures, OCBC Premier, UOB Privilege private bankers + AmCham SG / SBF founder-roundtable warm intros + Tatler SG / Robb Report / Business Times feature placement timed to RTS opening month + LinkedIn ads to verified SG household-income S$500k+ targets + influencer dinner-series with longevity-content creators (Peter Diamandis SEA tour Q4 2026).
gtm.pitch: Skip the SG hospital queue. Annual longevity baseline scan, Siemens 3T MRI, named consultant radiologist, same-day results, RTS Link transfer included. S$2,640 versus Mt Elizabeth S$12,388 — and you’re back in Singapore in 3 hours.
gtm.pricing: Comprehensive list S$2,640 (RM 8,699) — published in both MYR and SGD-equivalent. Annual baseline-tracking discount of 10% on Y2 return. RTS Link return ticket included end-2026.
gtm.content: Five assets in first 90 days: (1) 'The S$10,000 SG hospital MRI tax — and why you don’t need to pay it' MAB-compliant blog post; (2) Tatler SG profile of AEVUM’s consultant-radiologist roster (NSR-linked); (3) RTS Link concierge transfer demo video (hero asset for opening month); (4) longevity-baseline patient-experience walkthrough video; (5) Bahasa Indonesia/Mandarin landing pages for the cross-border cohort.

attack_plans.niche_name: Multi-day longevity bundle for ID HNW family-office
attack_plans.icp: 35-65yo Indonesian HNW with SG family-office structure, family business / banking / commodities, SG private banker introduction (Mandiri Private, BCA Prioritas, DBS Treasures), travels with spouse + 1-2 adult children on a 4-day SG/JB long weekend, expects discretion + Bahasa Indonesia patient comms.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: MHTC Malaysia Healthcare Travel 2024 inbound ID screening pool ~50,000 / yr; AEVUM realistically captures the upper-affluent slice routing through SG private bankers ~2,500 / yr at maturity; at Legacy Ultimate ARPU S$5,300 with 30% upgrade to Legacy Platinum (S$7,420) = blended ARPU S$5,930. Y3 slice TAM = 2,500 × S$5,930 = ~S$15M; calibrated downward to ~S$11M for realistic Y3 capture (~40% of slice given throughput cap and SG-via-JB private-banker flow ramp).
attack_plans.why_gap: ID HNW currently route through Mt Elizabeth Novena (S$11-13k for the principal) but Mt E is hospital-feel + busy + not multi-day-friendly. Sunway Velocity KL is more concierge but flight-friction kills it for a long-weekend trip. Gleneagles JB is the closest but hospital-utility framing without family-language briefings. No competitor offers 'multi-day discreet hospitality wrapper + Bahasa Indonesia consultant briefing + RTS Link concierge transfer' in one bundle. The gap exists because each existing player is either (a) a hospital optimising for clinical depth not hospitality, or (b) a wellness retreat with no MRI capability.
attack_plans.why_we_win: our_score 5 on rts_proximity_concierge + our_score 5 on published_pricing_transparency + our_score 4 on named_consultant_radiologist (with Bahasa Indonesia briefing add-on) + our_score 5 on same_day_results + our_score 4 on mri_led_longevity_baseline. Legacy Ultimate (RM 17,499 / S$5,300) and Legacy Platinum (RM 24,499 / S$7,420) bundle multi-day hotel partner (DoubleTree JB / Renaissance JB), private-driver SG-pickup, family lounge, biomarker panel, longevity coach — exactly the discreet hospitality + clinical depth combo the segment values. Pricing 35-50% below Mt E + Echelon Health Mayfair tier with experience that meaningfully exceeds the SG hospital model on hospitality.

gtm.channel: Direct relationship-building with SG private bankers servicing ID family-office clients (Mandiri Private SG, BCA Prioritas, DBS Treasures, Standard Chartered Priority Private) — preferred-vendor protocol with quarterly relationship dinners. Jakarta media placement in Tempo + Forbes Indonesia + The Globe Indonesia. Closed-door briefings at the SG private-banking summit (Q2 2026) and the Indonesian Family Business Summit (Bali, Q4 2026). NO direct ad spend in Jakarta — referral only.
gtm.pitch: A discreet long-weekend longevity baseline for the principal and the family — Siemens 3T MRI on Day 1, biomarker panel and longevity coach on Day 2, named consultant radiologist briefing in Bahasa Indonesia on Day 3, hotel partner across all three nights. S$5,300 versus Mt Elizabeth Novena S$11,000 + a more discreet experience.
gtm.pricing: Legacy Ultimate S$5,300 (RM 17,499) standard bundle; Legacy Platinum S$7,420 (RM 24,499) with hotel partner + 12-month named-consultant follow-up + family-member upgrade pricing (30% off). Family bundle: spouse Comprehensive at 30% discount. SGD lock-rate at booking to neutralise FX.
gtm.content: Three assets: (1) Bahasa Indonesia 'Petunjuk Kesehatan Konsultan' (Consultant Health Briefing) gated PDF for private-banker distribution; (2) discreet anonymous-principal case-study video (MAB-compliant, no testimonials, focus on facility + process); (3) family-friendly facility tour video showing private suite + lounge + spouse waiting area. Plus: a SG-private-banker referral pack with calculator showing tier-by-tier comparison vs Mt E Novena.

attack_plans.icp: Corporate HR / Group HR / family-office / single-family-office / PE-portfolio-operator buying for an executive cohort or principal family of 10-50 named scans per year as part of executive comp + risk management; procurement-mediated; 6-12 month sales cycle; aligned with Elitez Group’s existing B2B sales motion.
attack_plans.tam_reasoning: SG corporate executive screening market ~85,000 SG MNC executives screened annually (Aon SG 2025); ~5% are at the 'principal / C-suite' tier where annual premium screening is part of comp = ~4,250 cohort. AEVUM realistic Y3 capture ~6% of SG C-suite cohort = ~250 principals/yr × S$5,000 retainer-blended ARPU + ~10% family-office portfolio retainers (~S$50k/yr per portfolio) = ~S$6M slice TAM. Y1 ~30 principals (Elitez warm intros only); Y2 ~120 with first PE-portfolio deal; Y3 ~250 + 5 portfolio retainers.
attack_plans.why_gap: Raffles HealthShield + Mt Elizabeth corporate screening own the SG enterprise space but offer COMMODITY screening (S$80-300/employee for basic; ad-hoc S$11k+ tiers for principals). No competitor offers a 'C-suite-only annual MRI baseline retainer' SKU with named-radiologist-relationship, multi-year baseline-tracking, and family-extension pricing as a structured program. PE family-offices currently piece this together themselves: Mt E for the principal + ad-hoc imaging for family + manual comms. The gap is the productised retainer structure, not the underlying scans.
attack_plans.why_we_win: our_score 5 on rts_proximity_concierge + our_score 4 on published_pricing_transparency + our_score 4 on named_consultant_radiologist + our_score 5 on same_day_results, combined with Elitez Group’s existing 50-logo SG enterprise client base and B2B sales muscle. Founders Programme structure: RM 200-500k/yr retainer for n=20-40 guaranteed annual scans with named-consultant-radiologist relationship, MAB-compliant corporate-health-program framing, predictable utilisation that fills off-peak slots. The deliberate concession on follow_up_specialist_breadth (our_score 2) is solved at procurement time via a Gleneagles JB referral protocol baked into the contract.

gtm.channel: Direct enterprise sales through Elitez Group’s existing 50-logo client network (Pte Ltd, Security, Dynamic Human Capital, FMCG, Jobs Today, Property entities) + SBF/AmCham/SHRI corporate HR networks + targeted outreach to PE portfolio operators (Wavemaker, Vertex SEA, Jungle Ventures, Openspace, East Ventures) for portfolio-wide retainers. Closed-door briefings at the SG Family Office Forum + the SG HR Summit. RFP-ready procurement pack from Day 1.
gtm.pitch: The premium executive health benefit your principals actually want. Annual MRI baseline at AEVUM, named-consultant-radiologist relationship, 5-min RTS Link from Singapore, results before the principal’s flight home — for less than the Mt Elizabeth retail rate, with predictable annual budget.
gtm.pricing: Founders Programme retainer RM 200,000-500,000/yr for n=20-40 named principals (~RM 10,000-12,500 per principal blended). Family extension at 30% off list. Concierge transport SG-pickup included. Multi-year contracts at 5% discount. Capped at 30% of total facility capacity to protect concierge feel.
gtm.content: Four assets: (1) Founders Programme procurement pack (compliance, PDPA / PDP, audit-ready invoicing, cancellation policy, SLA); (2) PE-portfolio operator briefing webinar 'Principal Health Risk Management for SEA Portfolio Cos'; (3) named-consultant-radiologist roster pack with NSR linkage; (4) RFP-ready contract template for SG corporate procurement teams. Plus: an off-the-record reference list of 3 Elitez Group enterprise clients for buyer reference calls (consent-gated).
